mcps.name: GitHub
mcps.use: Issues, PRDs, code reviews, implementation tasks, and release workflows.

mcps.name: Linear or Jira
mcps.use: Roadmaps, prioritization, issue creation, and delivery tracking.

mcps.name: Figma
mcps.use: Design assets, UI analysis, prototyping, and acceptance criteria.

mcps.name: Notion or Google Drive
mcps.use: Research repositories, docs, PRDs, and meeting notes.

mcps.name: Slack or Gmail
mcps.use: Stakeholder communication, meeting prep, and executive updates.

mcps.name: PostHog, Amplitude, or Mixpanel
mcps.use: Product analytics, funnels, retention, and experiments.

mcps.name: BigQuery or Snowflake
mcps.use: SQL analysis, metric diagnosis, event schemas, and impact sizing.
